debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
X1 X2 : Set ↑A
h : HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X1 = HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X2
⊢ X1 ⊆ X2

proof:
by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩ := h1
  have : y = x := Subtype.ext hy'
  rw [this] at hy
  exact hy
failed_attempts:
by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  have h' := h x.val
  simp only [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h'
  obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := h' hx
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  simp only [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  have h' := h x.val
  simp only [Subtype.exists, Subtype.coe_eta, exists_and_right, exists_eq_right] at h'
  obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := h' hx
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  simp only [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  have h' := h x.val
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop] at h'
  obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := h' hx
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  simp only [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  have h' := h x.val
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop] at h'
  obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := h' hx
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  specialize h (x.val)
  simp_all [val_image]
  aesop

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  simp_all [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  <;> aesop

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩ := h1
  exact Set.ext_iff.mp (Set.mem_subsingleton (Set.subsingleton_of_subsingleton A) _ _) hy' ▸ hy

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩ := h1
  exact Set.ext_iff.mp (Subtype.eq_injective y x hy').symm ▸ hy

by
  intro x hx
  rw [Set.ext_iff] at h
  simp only [val_image, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
  have h' := h x.val
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, exists_prop] at h'
